title: CIRCULAR FoodPack: How to make flexible food packaging circular? (Technical Webinar 27.11.2024)
author: Fraunhofer Institute for Process Engineering and Packaging
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Between 2021 and 2024, the CIRCULAR FoodPack consortium has worked on designing circularity for flexible packaging, demonstrated the technical realisation of the various steps required to obtain Post-Consumer Recyclates, and how to integrate the PCR in new packaging meeting the high standards for food protection and safety. During the webinar, the project partners presented their key findings and provided a deep dive into the technical aspects of their work. IYou will gain insights into the following topics: 
 
  Collection & sorting   (by Suez & Polysecure)  
  Advanced mechanical recycling cascade   (by Ghent University, Laboratory for Circular Process Engineering)  
  Dissolution-based recycling cascade   (by Fraunhofer IVV)  
  Challenge tests   (by Fraunhofer IVV)  
  Design for and from recycling   (by Amcor)  
  Economical Market Aspects   (by National Technical University of Athens)  
 
   
 Note: This project has received funding from the European Union’s Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme under grant agreement No. 101003806.
